title: Gallup Home & Garden Weed Killer 1L - Glyphosate Herbicide Weed Killer for Effective Annual & Perennial Grass & Broad Leaved Weeds
features: Powerful Weed Control: Effectively eliminates a wide range of common weeds, including grass, dandelions, nettles, and more
Contains 360g/L glyphosate for superior performance in home and garden applications.
Versatile Application: Suitable for paths, driveways, patios, and garden areas, offering comprehensive weed management
Easy to Use: Simply dilute and apply with a sprayer for fast, visible results. Includes clear instructions for safe use
Cost-Effective Solution: A single 1L bottle covers a large area, providing excellent value for maintaining a weed-free outdoor space
description: Product description Take control of your garden with Barclay Home and Garden 1L, sold by Direct4Gardens, the ultimate solution for eliminating stubborn weeds. Formulated with 360g/L glyphosate, this professional-grade weed killer works deep to target roots, ensuring long-lasting results. Gallup is ideal for paths, patios, driveways, and open garden areas, offering versatile application options. Whether you're tackling annual weeds or deep-rooted perennials, this product guarantees visible results quickly. Designed for ease of use, the formula is straightforward to dilute and apply with a sprayer. One bottle covers a large area, making it a cost-effective choice for homeowners and gardening enthusiasts alike. Restore your outdoor spaces to their pristine condition with Home and Garden 1L—trusted for its powerful performance and reliability. Instructions for Use: Dilute as per label instructions. Apply directly to leaves for effective absorption. Avoid spraying on desirable plants. Note: Always read the label and follow safety guidelines when using this product. Directions Dilute the product as per label instructions. Apply 24 ml per 40m2 directly to the leaves of unwanted plants using a knapsack sprayer. Avoid spraying on desirable plants. Always read the label and follow safety guidelines when using this product. Safety Warning Use plant protection products safely. Always read the label and product information before use. See more
